choices.name: ContractRenewal
choices.choiceText: Contract Renewal

choices.name: NewBusiness
choices.choiceText: New Business

decisions.name: Copy_2_of_Copy_1_of_Checking_User
decisions.label: Copy 2 of Copy 1 of Checking User

rules.name: Copy_2_of_Copy_1_of_If_US
rules.label: Copy 2 of Copy 1 of If US

Flow.description: Flow to create an Opportunity from the Contact screen. This is called from the action button Create Opportunity.

formulas.description: for MBD set the close date default to today +180
formulas.name: defaultCloseDate

formulas.description: this is value to use for the opportunity, will default to the users role division unless the user changes it
formulas.name: OpportunityDivision

formulas.description: if the user is happy with the division taken from their role then use that else use the value selected
formulas.name: selectedOppDivision

formulas.description: get the current users division from their Role
formulas.name: userRoleDivision

Flow.label: New Opportunity

recordCreates.name: Copy_1_of_Create_Opportunity_for_Products
recordCreates.label: Copy 1 of Create Opportunity for Products

screens.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Error_Message
screens.label: Copy 1 of Copy 1 of Error Message

screens.description: display success message and link to Opportunity
screens.name: Copy_2_of_Opportunity_Created
screens.label: Copy 2 of Opportunity Created

fields.name: Copy_2_of_OppSuccessMessage
fields.fieldText: You have successfully created your Opportunity click here to open it

fields.name: newOpportunityCreationWelcome
fields.fieldText: <p style="text-align: center;">You are going to create an Opportunity for <strong>{!recordId.Name}</strong> at <strong>{!recordId.Account.Name}</strong>.</p>

value.stringValue: Do you want to add Products

screens.description: display success message and link to Opportunity
screens.name: Opportunity_Created
screens.label: Opportunity Created

fields.name: OppSuccessMessage
fields.fieldText: You have successfully created your Opportunity click here to open it

variables.description: get the ID of the contact we are starting from
variables.name: recordId
